curation_notes: Primary location derived from patch diff. The vulnerability is in the get_conn method which unconditionally disables certificate validation (tlsAllowInvalidCertificates=True or ssl_cert_reqs=CERT_NONE) when SSL is enabled. Only one non-test source file was modified (mongo.py); CHANGELOG.rst is documentation. No sibling files in the hooks directory contain the same vulnerability pattern. The pre-assigned class crypto-weakness (from CWE-295 Improper Certificate Validation) is correct as the vulnerability is misused TLS/SSL configuration.
